title: CompanyInfo SD-JWT VC Schema
description: Schema for the Company Information (CompanyInfo) Attestation encoded as SD-JWT VC, based on the WeBuild Attestation Rulebook and draft-ietf-oauth-sd-jwt-vc-09

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type — uniquely identifies the credential type. Always present in plain text. NOT selectively disclosable.

iss.description: Issuer identifier — a URI identifying the issuer of the credential. As per RFC 7519. NOT selectively disclosable.

iat.description: Issued At — Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when the attestation was issued. NOT selectively disclosable.

exp.description: Expiration Time — Unix timestamp after which the attestation is no longer valid. NOT selectively disclosable.

nbf.description: Not Before — Unix timestamp before which the credential MUST NOT be accepted. Optional. NOT selectively disclosable.

sub.description: Subject — identifier for the subject of the credential (the legal entity). NOT selectively disclosable.

issuing_entity.description: Identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. For EAA this is the subject entity. For QEAA this is the QTSP. NOT selectively disclosable.

attestation_legal_category.description: Legal category of this attestation under eIDAS 2. SHALL be 'EAA' or 'QEAA'. NOT selectively disclosable.

schema_version.description: Version of the schema used for this attestation. Optional metadata.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL where the trust anchor for verifying this attestation can be retrieved. Optional metadata.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. Typically the subject entity itself for self-issued EAA attestations, or the QTSP identifier for QEAA attestations.

employee_number.description: Total number of employees in the legal entity at the time of reporting. SHALL be a non-negative integer.

number_of_employees.description: Total number of employees in the legal entity at the time of reporting. SHALL be a non-negative integer. MUST be selectively disclosable (SD claim).

trade_alias.description: Registered trade names or aliases under which the legal entity operates. MAY contain zero or more text values. Optional. MUST be selectively disclosable.

previous_legal_name.description: Previously registered legal name(s) of the entity. SHALL NOT contain the current legal name. Optional. MUST be selectively disclosable.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For CompanyInfo attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the CompanyInfo attestation can be found or looked up.

schema_version.description: Version of the CompanyInfo attestation schema used.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.

financial_statements.description: Structured financial reporting data following a specified taxonomy. Mandatory. MUST be selectively disclosable as a unit.

taxonomy.description: Financial reporting standard used to structure and label financial data.

facts.description: List of reported financial facts. SHALL contain at least one Fact object.

Fact.title: Financial Fact
Fact.description: A single reported financial data point associated with a specific reporting period, taxonomy concept, unit, and value.

id.description: Unique identifier of the fact within the attestation. SHALL be unique within the facts array.

concept.description: Name of the reported financial metric. SHALL use a standardized concept code from Section 2.8.4.

value.description: Reported numeric value of the fact. SHALL be a non-negative numeric value where applicable.

unit.description: Unit of measurement. When representing a monetary value SHALL follow ISO 4217 (e.g., EUR, USD). Non-monetary: '%' or 'ratio'.

period_start.description: Start date of the reporting period. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD).

period_end.description: End date of the reporting period. SHALL be a valid ISO 8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD). SHALL be equal to or later than period_start.
